feats.name: Expanded Resonance
feats.description_markdown:
You learn a brand new design to weave your magic. You gain the following **spell shapes** for your knowledge. In addition, you now may have three prepared **spell shapes** a day, and may swap them out during a **full rest**.
- **Critical Resonance** When casting a spell, decrease critical roll by 1 (20 to 19) for 5 **Resonance**. You may repeat this **Resonance** up to 3 times.
- **Fragmented Resonance** When a spell effect only a single target, you may spend up to 3 **Resonance** to select another target. This includes targeting yourself.
- **Graceful Resonance** When you cast a **zone** spell, spend 1 point of **Resonance** per target you wish to exclude from being effected against your spell.
- **Pursuing Resonance** When making a **spell attack** and miss, spend 1 point of **Resonance** per tier of the spell to reroll a d20. Take the new roll.

You instinctively sense creatures that share aspects of your bloodline. Gain **Resolve** on checks to identify or recall information about beings related to your **Bloodline**. Additionally, you can sense the presence (but not exact location) of such beings within adjacent **zones**.

feats.name: Magical Resonance
feats.description_markdown:
You understand the flow of magic through your body and are able to shape it new ways. You gain the following **spell shapes** for your knowledge. In addition, you now may have four prepared **spell shapes** a day.
- **Fluctuating Resonance** When you cast a spell, Alter the damage type to another within the same damage category (**Arcane** → **Ether**/**Void**/**Psi**)
- **Acute Resonance** When you cast a spell, reroll 1's and 2's once when rolling for damage and take the second roll.
- **Reverberating Resonance** When you cast a **Tier 1** or **2** Spell with a **Duration** of 10 minutes or longer and no *Focused* trait, you may extend the duration to last until you being a **Long Rest**
- **Shifting Resonance** When you cast a spell, spend 2 **Resonance** x the spell's **Tier**, and change the size of the effect spell. (Single → Burst (Touch) → Burst(Close) → Wave (1 Zone) → Wave (2 Zone) → etc.)
- **Surging Resonance** When you use a *Decimation* spell, spend 2 **Resonance** and add 2d4 **elemental** damage of choice to damage.

feats.name: Channeled Emotions
feats.description_markdown:
Once per **Skirmish**, when you **cast a spell**, choose an emotion (rage, sorrow, joy, awe). If the target is susceptible to emotional influence (not immune to charm, fear or mental), you gain one of the following
- **Rage** Add your **Will** to damage dealt.
- **Sorrow** On success, apply **sapped** or **weakened** to the target.
- **Joy** Heals an adjacent ally for 1d4 per spell tier.
- **Awe** Target makes all **attacks** with ****Strain**** for 1 round.

feats.name: Spellborn
feats.description_markdown:
You gain access to a new **Sphere of Magic** from your ability to alter and control spells of all kind. You may choose to gain access to **aberration**, **conjuration**, or **mortification**. Based on your choice gain the following effects
- **Aberration** You can telepathically commune with a total of creatures equal to your **Will**, creatures of Mind **defense** 13 and lower are immune to your telepathy.
- **Conjuration** When you cast a **conjuration** spell, you create a 10ft/3m wide arcane wall within your **zone** that lasts until the end of the **Skirmish**. Up to two allies can use it as **cover**.
- **Mortification** Once per **respite**, when an ally within **close** range would gain **Wounds**, spend **Resonance** equal and up to the amount gained and prevent.

feats.name: Elemental Armaments
feats.description_markdown:
You can manifest weapons of pure primal energy. Attack rolls made utilizing these armaments utilize your **Will + Tier** instead of physical attributes. You gain a specific weapon manifestation based on your chosen Elemental Core:


- **Flame — Flame Blades**
    You manifest either a blazing *Greatsword* ($1d10$ Fire) or a pair of crackling heat *Daggers* ($1d4$ Fire). They use your Will for attack and damage rolls. Critical hits inflict **Burning 1**.


- **Forest — Bastion**
    You manifest a *Mace* and a *Light Shield* grown from dense, iron-hard wood. The Mace deals $1d6$ Bludgeoning + Will damage. While wielding the shield, once per turn if you would take *Physical* or *Elemental* damage (except *Fire*), you gain **Resistance** against that specific attack. Critical hits with the Mace apply the **Dazed** condition to the target until the start of your next turn.
    
- **Land — Iron Spike** 
    You forge a throwing *Javelin* of solid, heavy metal. **Damage:** $1d8$ + Will | **Type:** Piercing/Metal | **Range:** Close. The weapon automatically flies back to your hand after the attack resolves. On a critical hit, you may attempt to *Grapple* the target and pull them up to one zone closer to you.
   
- **Ocean — Ice Knives**
    You shape and hurl floating *Throwing Knives* of supernatural frost. **Damage:** $2$ Puncture + $1d4$ Ice + Will | **Range:** Close. Critical hits apply the **Sapped** condition to the target until the start of your next turn.
    
   
- **Sky — Zephyr Bow**
    You manifest a spectral bow formed of tightly pressurized, whistling air. **Damage:** $1d6$ Puncture + Will | **Range:** Far. Critical hits compress the atmosphere around the target, forcing them to succeed on a Fortitude save or fall **Prone**.
    
   
- **Tempest — Stormbringer**
    You call down a crackling, fluid melee weapon formed of pure lightning that possesses the _Rend_ trait. **Damage:** $1d6$ Electric + Will | **Range:** Melee. Critical hits detonate in a flash of brilliant radiance, applying the **Blinded** condition to the target until the end of their next turn.

feats.name: Primordial Art
feats.description_markdown:
Based upon your *Core* you gain two new *Elemental Arts*


**Flame**
- *Flame Shield* | **Cost** 3 Energy — You gain a *Flame Shield* with 3 Charges, when you are hit you may expend a charge to reduce the damage by 1d6 + **Will**, and deal that much damage back in **Fire** damage 
- *Burning Grasp* | **Cost** 2 Energy — You make a melee attack against a target's **Fortitude**, on hit the target is ***Restrained*** by you and takes 3d4 Fire.

**Forest**
- *Entangle* | **Cost** 2 Energy; **Range** Close — Make a ranged attack against a target's Fortitude using your **Will**. On a hit, the target becomes ***Immobilized***. Target may attempt to break free using 1 **AP** against your *Arts DC*
- *Splinter* | **Cost** 2 Energy — You make a melee attack against a target, On hit the target takes attack damage plus an additional 2d4 **Puncture**. The target also gains ***Bleeding 1***, and on a **critical hits** enemies in the same **Engagement** to also gain ***Bleeding 1***.

**Land**
- *Bone Crusher* | **Cost** 2 Energy — You form a monolithic mass of stone or metal and slam it into a target. Make a melee attack roll, on a hit the target takes 2d6 **Blunt** + **Will**, and gains ***Crippled*** until the end of it's next turn.
- *Floating Disc* | **Cost** 1 Energy; **Duration** 1 Minute; **Range** Close — You create a platform of earth or metal that you can move up to 20ft/6m away in any direction. The platform is a disc in 10ft/3m radius and can hold up to 500lbs. The duration can be extended indefinitely by maintaining concentration on the disc, but you can only **Dash**, **Disengage**, **Stand** while maintaining concentration; if passed the 1 minute duration it instantly crumbles, or you go **Unconscious** 

**Ocean**
- *Biting Shard* | **Cost** 2 Energy; **Range** Nearby — Make a ranged attack roll against a target's **Fortitude**, on hit the target takes 1d4 **Ice** + **Will**, and gains the ***Stunned*** condition.
- *Restoring Source* | **Cost** 2 Energy; **Range** Touch — You touch a target within range, you restore 1d4 +**Tier** of a target's **Vitality**.

**Sky**
-  *Vacuum Seal* |**Cost** 1 Energy; **Range** Nearby — You select a target within range, and it gains the ***Defea***
-  *Air Cutter* | **Cost** 2 Energy — Your next ranged attack deals an additional 2d4 **Slash**.

**Tempest**
- *Accelerated Strike* | **Cost** 1 Energy — The **AP** cost of your next *Power Attack* this turn is reduced by 1 AP (minimum 1 AP).
- *Blinding Bolt* | **Cost** 2 Energy; **Range** Close — Make a ranged attack using **Will**. On a hit, target takes 1d4 **Electric** and is *Blinded* until end of next turn

feats.name: Bulwark Maneuver
feats.description_markdown:
You use your body as bastion of defense for warfare. You gain or cause effects based upon the activated **bulwark maneuver**. Chose two from the following five maneuvers:
- **Bulwark Rally** Let the rush of danger be the the reason you and your ally survive. Until the start of your next turn, choose yourself and one ally with your **Engagement**, you both gain +1 to **armor** defense.
- **Controlled Blows** You stead your weapon arm to insure your own safety. Until the start of your next turn, you decrease weapon dice size (min. d4) and gain +2 to **armor** defense. 
- **Counter Strike** You brace yourself for impact, and make yourself ready to retaliate against the next melee attack. When a target in your **Engagement** would target you with a **melee** attack, you retaliate with a single attack roll until the start of your next turn. Gain +2 to hit if the target's attack is a **critical miss**.
- **Shield Charge** You raise your shield charging head first into the enemy and roll an attack with a **shield bash**. On a **critical hit**, target becomes **dazed** until the end of its turn. Gain +1 to hit if not **engaged** with the target.
- **Weapon Disarm** You snatch or jam an opponent’s weapon. Until the start of your next turn, when a target within your **Engagement** makes a **melee weapon** attack against you, before the attack is rolled, make a **body** check against the target's **body** defense. On a **success**, you stop the attack from landing. On a **critical success**, the target's weapon is **dropped** between the two of you.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Path Investment** *2 Sentinel Feats*
**Trait** Maneuver   |  **Cost** 1 AP + 2 Adrenaline
You use your body as bastion of defense for warfare. You gain or cause effects based upon the activated **bulwark maneuver**. Chose two from the following five maneuvers:
- **Bulwark Rally** Let the rush of danger be the the reason you and your ally survive. Until the start of your next turn, choose yourself and one ally with your **Engagement**, you both gain +1 to **armor** defense.
- **Controlled Blows** You stead your weapon arm to insure your own safety. Until the start of your next turn, you decrease weapon dice size (min. d4) and gain +2 to **armor** defense. 
- **Counter Strike** You brace yourself for impact, and make yourself ready to retaliate against the next melee attack. When a target in your **Engagement** would target you with a **melee** attack, you retaliate with a single attack roll until the start of your next turn. Gain +2 to hit if the target's attack is a **critical miss**.
- **Shield Charge** You raise your shield charging head first into the enemy and roll an attack with a **shield bash**. On a **critical hit**, target becomes **dazed** until the end of its turn. Gain +1 to hit if not **engaged** with the target.
- **Weapon Disarm** You snatch or jam an opponent’s weapon. Until the start of your next turn, when a target within your **Engagement** makes a **melee weapon** attack against you, before the attack is rolled, make a **body** check against the target's **body** defense. On a **success**, you stop the attack from landing. On a **critical success**, the target's weapon is **dropped** between the two of you.

- **Accurate Wound** Make an **attack roll** against the target's **body**. On a successful hit, you can choose to give the target the condition **crippled** or 
- **Concussive Strike** Make an **attack roll**, adding your Ambition to the **attack roll**. On a success, dealing half damage and the target is **dazed** until the start of your next turn.
- **Driving Blow** When you hit a target, your next attack against a different target in the same Engagement gains +2 to hit and your **Ambition** to damage.
- **Dragon's Pursuit** Make an **attack roll**, adding your **Ambition** to attack and damage. On a **critical hit**, if the target is prone they gain **maimed**

- **Shield Breaker** Make an **attack roll**, against a target using a shield gaining +4 to hit. On a **critical hit**, target's **armor** is reduced by your **Tier** until the start of their turn.

**Light**
- **+1 Body Defense** while wearing Light armor
- You gain **Resolve** on **Body** checks against **spells**
- Once per **respite** when you take damage, you gain **disengage** and can move without provoking **Reflex Strike**

**Medium**

- You gain a **Damage Reduction Pool (20)**; when it reaches 0 the armor still functions normally
- Your **unarmed attacks** gain the benefit of the **Signature School** of the *Enforcer* , and deal **2d4 bludgeoning**

feats.name: Avowed Nemesis
feats.description_markdown:
As part of your **Daily Preparation**, you proclaim a vow against your enemies and choose one **Nemesis** for the day based on your **Creed**.  
When you first encounter your chosen **Nemesis**, they become **Marked** for the duration of the encounter.

While a creature is **Marked**:

- They cannot become **hidden** or **Obscured** to you.
- You have **Resolve** on checks to **track**, **shove**, or **grapple** them.    
- If they **Dash** or **Disengage**, your next **Dash** or **Disengage** cost 1 AP less.

| Creeds       | Choice of Nemesis                                          |
| ------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Honor**    | *Deathless, Mortals, Monstrosities, Occult*  |
| **Serenity** | *Deathless, Forged, Occult, Wyrms*           |
| **Dominion** | *Monstrosities, Primordial, Wildlife, Wyrms* |
| **Entropy**  | *Eidolic, Mortals, Primordial, Wildlife*     |
| **Paradox**  | *Eidolic, Forged, Occult, Primordial*        |

feats.name: Aura of Creed
feats.description_markdown:
Based upon your Creed, you gain a new **Aura**. These Auras effect those within **10ft** of you or within your **Engagement**.

Your Aura is active while you are **conscious**.

| **Creed**    | **Aura Effect**                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| ------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| **Honor**    | Allies within your Aura gain **Resolve** against checks to resist or break **emotional** conditions. Enemies within your Aura suffer **Strain** on checks to inflict **emotional** conditions.                           |
| **Serenity** | Once per turn, when an ally within your Aura takes damage, split the damage: you take half (rounded up), and the ally takes half (rounded down). The damage taken may be reduced by any **Reduction Pool** possessed.    |
| **Dominion** | Allies who **start their turn** within your Aura gain a **Reduction Pool** equal to **1d4 + your Tier**. This Reduction Pool fades at the start of your next turn.                                                       |
| **Entropy**  | When an enemy within your Aura takes damage, once per turn they must make a **Mind** check against your **Spell DC**. On a failure, all **Maneuver** trait actions cost them **+1 AP** until the end of their next turn. |
| **Paradox**  | Once per turn, when an ally within your Aura would suffer a **Critical Hit**, you may choose to reduce it to a **normal hit**. When you do, you gain **Resolve** on your next attack roll.                               |

- **Critical Success** As success, and gains *Compelled* against you
- **Success** they must choose a new **action** or lose it entirely
- **Failure** Target loses **1 AP**
- **Critical Failure** no effect

- **Paranoia** you attack the **Will** of a target, on **success** the target becomes **frightened** of you, and on **critical success** it is also **compelled** towards you.

feats.name: Watcher's Gaze
feats.description_markdown:
Once per **respite**, you analyze a creature within **close** range, and can choose to learn two of the following 
- Does it have a **Resistance**
- Does it have a **immunity**
- Does it have a **weakness**
- What is its weakest **defense**

Against this target, you deal an additional **1d4 damage** on your attacks until the end of the skirmish.

feats.description_markdown:
You propel yourself forward with a surge of **arcane** energy.

- You gain **Dash**.
- Your **next attack this turn** deals an additional **1d8 arcane** damage.

feats.name: Mana Strike

activation.raw: 1 AP + Reservoir equal to the spell’s tier

feats.description_markdown:
You channel magical power into your **Bound Armament**, storing an **offensive spell** within it.
- You must pay the spell’s **Reservoir** cost when storing it.
- When you hit a target with your Bound Armament, you may **unleash the stored spell** against that target.    
- If the spell has an **area of effect**, it instead affects **only the chosen target**.
- Power Strike **does not** effect the spell stored in the Bound Armament

The spell dissipates if not used by the end of the skirmish.

feats.name: Spell Parry

activation.raw: Reservoir equal to the spell’s Tier

feats.description_markdown:
When a **spell** targets or affects you, you may raise your **Bound Armament** to intercept the arcane force.

Reduce the spell’s damage by: 
- **Spellcasting Modifier** + 2d6

If this reduces the damage to **0**, you ignore any secondary or additional effects of the spell.

You also gain proficiency with **shields**.

feats.name: Gateway Surveyor
feats.description_markdown:
Your connection to the weave of magic allows you to detect magical anomalies, weak points between realms, or ancient arcane structures. When traveling or exploring, you may make a **lore (Arcane)** check to identify any of the following
- Hidden magical effects, lingering spell energy, or magical traps
- The presence of a **portal**, **teleportation**, or **realm travel**
- Whether an area has been recently warped by **spheres of magic** you are studied in.
In addition, you gain access to the magic sphere of **Divination**.

feats.name: Mystic Armament
feats.description_markdown:
If you **bound armament** would be separated from you, you can use a **free action** to summon it to your hand. In addition, based upon your **bound armament's** damage type it gains the following effects.

| Type        | Effect                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| ----------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Slashing    | Your weapon burns with arcane energy. Your attacks may target **Body**, on a **critical hit**, your target starts **burning** with a stack equal to your **Tier** but takes **arcane** instead of **Fire**              |
| Piercing    | Your weapon pierces into the psyche bypassing defenses. Your attacks may target **Mind**, on a **critical hit**, the targets armor is lowered equal to your **Tier** against the next attack to strike them.            |
| Bludgeoning | Your weapon crushes the soul with disruptive force. Your attacks may target **Will**, on a **critical hit**, the target suffers a penalty to their **attack rolls** equal to your **Tier** until the end of their turn. |

feats.name: Remnant Warrior
feats.description_markdown:
You have learned remnants of arcane power to enhance your equipment beyond the traditional methods of augmentation. As part of your ****Daily Preparation**s** you imbue **remnants** onto eligible items up to your **Tier**, and these do not take an augmentation slot. You choose one **remnant** to learn
- **Chaotic** (*Accessory*) When you are below half **vitality** or half **wounds**, on **attack rolls** or **skill checks** rolls you may re-roll 1s once.
- **Disruption** (*Weapon*) Once per **target**, when you hit a **spellcaster**, their next **spell attack** is rolled with **Strain**.
- **Dissipation** (*Accessory/Weapon*) Once per **rest**, when a spell of equal **Tier** or less targets you, you may use your **maneuver** to collapse the effect—rolling the warden's **mind** vs caster’s **DC**, on success, the spell fizzles.
- **Glint** (*Armor/Accessory*) Once per **respite**, reduce any damage by 1d12 and teleport 1 zone **away**.
- **Prism** (*Armor/Shield*) Once per **respite**, when you take **elemental** damage you gain **Resistance** to that element until the end of your next turn, and may deal 2d4 of that **element** on your next attack.
- **Phoenix** (*Armor/Weapon*) Once per **day**, when you receive damage and gain **Wounds**, reduce the damage to **0** and drop to 1 **vitality** instead.

feats.name: Familiar Weapon
feats.description_markdown:
Your encounters and familiarity with magic has caused your **Bound Armament** to gain it's own autonomy. It can float next you at all times not counting as being held, and cannot travel further than 5ft/1.5m away. You can command with **1 AP** to:
- Make an attack once per turn
- Stow your weapon in an void pocket concealing it completely
- To summon it back from the void
